name: Construction Machinery Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Supplies structural and wear profiles — boom/arm chord sections, slide guide channels, pivot pin blanks, frame cross-members, and wear strips — to excavator, dozer, and loader OEMs. Market ~$225B global (2024). Key OEMs: Caterpillar, Komatsu, Liebherr, Volvo CE.
entryStrategy: Existing market — grow share in new platform programs via pre-qualified die library and certified SPC data per batch; target S690QL lightweight redesign programs.
